Military


Ukraine Conflict News





14 June 2025 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

  • U.S. marines move into Los Angeles amid protests over immigration raids People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- About 200 U.S. marines have been deployed to Los Angeles, the second largest city in the United States, to protect a federal building there, the military said on Friday, after a week of protests over the current administration's immigration raids in the city.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • USNORTHCOM announces additional security measures at installations US Northern Command 14 Jun 2025 -- Based on world events, U.S. Northern Command has directed additional security measures at all military installations in the USNORTHCOM area of responsibility, which includes the continental United States and Alaska.

  • Pentagon Chief Says US Moves Its Air Defense Systems From Ukraine to Middle East Sputnik 14 Jun 2025 -- The United States is redeploying some of its air defense systems from Ukraine to the Middle East, US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said on Saturday.

  • China stays committed to promoting sound China-U.S. military-to-military relationship: spokesperson People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- China is committed to promoting the steady, sound and sustainable development of the China-U.S. military-to-military relationship, a Chinese defense spokesperson said Friday.

  • Doorstop Interview, Geelong Australia DOD 14 Jun 2025

  • PH acquires 12 FA-50 combat jets from South Korea Philippine News Agency 14 Jun 2025 -- The Department of National Defense (DND) announced on Saturday the acquisition of 12 FA-50 Block 70 light combat aircraft from Korea Aerospace Industries, Ltd. (KAI).

  • ICG, Navy & IAF Execute High-Risk Operation to Stabilise Fire-Hit Singaporean Vessel Off Kochi India PIB 14 Jun 2025 -- In a major development in the firefighting and salvage operation of Singaporean Vessel MV Wan Hai 503, the Indian Coast Guard (ICG), along with the Indian Navy and Indian Air Force, successfully transferred the tow of the distressed container vessel to the ocean-going tug Offshore Warrior on June 13, 2025

  • The Chief of the General Staff, LTG Eyal Zamir, Today (Saturday) Met with Air Crews and Technicians From Tel Nof Airbase Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025

  • Parliamentary Secretary highlights the need to invest in strengthening defence capabilities at the GLOBSEC Forum Latvia MFA 14 Jun 2025 -- On 13-14 June 2025, in Prague, Czechia, the Parliamentary Secretary of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Artjoms Uršuļskis, participated in the international GLOBSEC Forum.

  • PM call with Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman of Saudi Arabia: 14 June 2025 Gov.UK 14 Jun 2025

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • At least 15 Palestinians killed in Israeli strikes at notorious US-backed GHF aid site in Gaza Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- At least 15 Palestinians have been killed and tens of others injured after hundreds of people tried to enter an aid site run by the US-backed Gaza Humanitarian Foundation (GHF).

    • Operation Rising Lion / Operation True Promise III

  • Statement by PM Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 14 Jun 2025
  • Statement by President Herzog to the International Community - 14 June 2025 Israel MFA 14 Jun 2025
  • FM Sa'ar's statement regarding the operation in Iran Israel MFA 14 Jun 2025
  • Israeli media confirm 4 fatalities, 70 injuries from Iran's missile barrage Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Israeli media says at least four people have been killed and over 70 others injured in Iran's full-scale missile attacks at the heart of the occupied territories as part of the Islamic Republic's retaliatory Operation True Promise III against the illegal entity.

  • The IDF Struck an Underground Site in Western Iran Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • The IAF Concluded a Wave of Strikes in the Skies of Tehran Tonight Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • Israeli Navy Missile Boats, the Aerial Defense Array, and IAF Fighter Jets and Aircraft Intercepted Dozens of UAVs Launched from Iran Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • IDF Eliminates Over 20 Commanders in the Iranian Regime's Security Apparatus Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • AIF Strikes on Surface-to-Surface Missiles in Western Iran Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • Press Briefing by IDF Spokesperson, BG Effie Defrin-June 14, 2025 Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • Press Briefing by IDF Spokesperson, BG Effie Defrin-June 14, 2025 Israel Defense Forces 14 Jun 2025
  • Wang Yi Has a Phone Call with Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi PRC MofA 14 Jun 2025
  • Israel kills 60, including 29 children, in attack on residential building in Tehran Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- An Israeli airstrike on a residential high-rise in the Iranian capital, Tehran, has killed at least 60 people, including 29 children, according to authorities.
  • Israel attacks Iranian energy infrastructure IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli regime has reportedly conducted strikes against two natural gas installations in southern Iran, escalating the war to a new level.
  • 78 Iranians are killed and 320 wounded so far in Israeli strikes: Envoy to the U.N. IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Envoy to the United Nations Sa'eed Iravani says 78 people, including senior military officials, have been killed and 320 injured so far in Israeli strikes.

  • Fires reported at two Iranian refineries due to Israeli attacks Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Israeli attacks have caused fires in two refineries in the southern Iranian province of Bushehr, according to a report published in the local media.
  • Two Iranian generals killed during Israel's latest assaults against Iran Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Two senior members of the General Staff of Iran's Armed Forces have lost their lives during the Israeli regime's latest assaults against Iran.

  • Iran shoots down another F-35 fighter jet belonging to Israel: Army IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Air Defense Forces have shot down another fifth-generation F-35 fighter jet belonging to the Israeli regime, amid the continued exchange of fire between Tehran and Tel Aviv.
  • Iran downs Israeli drone in northwestern city IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Republic has announced the shooting down of an Israeli drone near Iran's northwestern city of Tabriz, East Azerbaijan province.
  • Iran successfully hits Israeli targets in response to regime's aggression IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The Army of the Islamic Republic of Iran says it has successfully destroyed targets in the occupied territories of Israel in the wake of Israeli strikes against the Islamic Republic.
  • Latest round of Iran's missile attack triggers sirens in occupied territories IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Israeli media reported the launch of a fifth wave of Iranian missile strikes against locations across the occupied territories.
  • Israel being pummeled again now; strikes will continue as long as necessary IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- A second round of strikes has begun on targets inside Israel, with Israeli media reporting huge explosions as Iranian missiles rain down.
  • Iran's IRGC confirms military attack launched against "tens of" Israeli targets People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) said on Friday it launched a military operation against "tens of" targets, military centers, and aerial bases in Israel.
  • Iran downs 2 Israeli jets, captures female pilot: media People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's air defense has downed two Israeli Lockheed Martin F-35 Lightning II fighter jets as well as a large number of micro aerial vehicles (MAVs), capturing a female Israeli pilot, the semi-official Tasnim news agency reported.
  • US Involved in Shooting Down Iranian Missiles - Reports Sputnik 14 Jun 2025 -- Israel received help from US air defense systems and a Navy destroyer in shooting down Iranian missiles launched in response to Israel's attack on Iran, The Washington Post reported, citing US officials.
  • IRGC says it struck Israeli fighter jet fuel production and energy supply sites with missiles, drones Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it has struck the Israeli regime's fighter jet fuel production facilities and energy supply lines with a massive barrage of missiles and drones.
  • True Promise III: Iran launches a fresh wave of missile, drone strikes on Zionist entity Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) launched a new wave of missile and drone strikes against the Zionist entity on Saturday night, following the initial phase of the retaliatory operation "True Promise III" on Friday.
  • Iranian Army says it shot down another F-35 fighter jet belonging to Israeli regime Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's air defense forces have shot down another fifth-generation F-35 fighter jet belonging to the Zionist regime, amid the continued exchange of fire between Tehran and Tel Aviv.
  • Iran army says suicide drones successfully struck targets in occupied territories Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Republic of Iran Army has announced that Arash-class suicide drones infiltrated the airspace of the occupied territories and successfully destroyed their designated targets.
  • Iran Launches New Waves Of Missile Strikes On Israel As Netanyahu Vows Further Attacks RFE/RL 14 Jun 2025 -- Tehran launched fresh missiles strikes against Tel Aviv and other Israeli cities as Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu vowed further attacks against Iran in a military operation that has targeted the nuclear and military facilities of his country's arch enemy.
  • Israel's Attack On Iran Could Be Test Of Trump's Resolve To Keep US Out Of War RFE/RL 14 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli military operation against Iran's nuclear enrichment facilities and ballistic missile program and the US reaction has set up a test for US President Donald Trump and his campaign promise to keep the United States out of foreign conflicts.

  • President Pezeshkian: Israel should await harsher response if it repeats attacks IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian has warned Israel of harsher response from the Iranian Armed forces if it continues its aggressions against the Islamic Republic.
  • Israel's backers seeking to justify Zionist aggression against Iran: Foreign Ministry sokesperson IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei says Israel's backers and apologists are trying to justify Israeli strikes against Iran.
  • Leader appoints new chief of I.R.G.C.'s Aerospace Force IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei has appointed Majid Mousavi as the new commander of the Aerospace Force of the I.R.G.C. following the martyrdom of Amirali Hajizadeh in the Israeli strikes against Iran.
  • Successor commanders will fully pursue the path of their predecessors: Armed Forces IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Brigadier General Abolfazl Shekarchi, spokesperson for the Armed Forces, says the newly-appointed commanders will advance the path of their predecessors with full power.
  • No casualties in Israeli strikes on Iran's nuclear facilities: A.E.O.I. spokesperson IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Behrouz Kamalvandi, the spokesperson for the Atomic Energy Organization of Iran (A.E.O.I.), says that Israeli attacks on nuclear infrastructure caused no loss of life.
  • Iran urges U.N. to take decisive action against Israel's aggression IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has emphasized the urgent need for the United Nations to take swift steps in response to Israel's acts of aggression against Iran.
  • General Hatami appointed new Army Chief IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Commander-in-Chief Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei has appointed Major General Amir Hatami as Chief Commander of the Army of the Islamic Republic of Iran.
  • Iran calls for making Israel accountable for recent attacks IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and his French counterpart, Jean-Noel Barrot, in a telephone conversation discussed the Israeli aggression against Iran.
  • Iran's supreme leader warn Israel of harsh punishment following Israeli airstrikes People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei said on Friday that Israel will receive harsh punishment following Israeli airstrikes on Iranian targets earlier in the day.
  • Israeli Attacks Amount to Declaration of War - Iran's UN Envoy Sputnik 14 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Permanent Representative to the United Nations Amir Saeid Iravani said that Israel's Friday attacks against Iran were carried out with US support and amount to a declaration of war.
  • Muslim nations' defensive prowess essential to foil Israel's plots: Iran president Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the brutal Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic shows that strengthening defensive power is a necessity for all Muslim countries to thwart the regime's plots.
  • Iran Armed Forces will give more crushing response to Israel if aggression continues: President Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the Armed Forces will give a more crushing and powerful response to the Israeli regime if it carries out more aggression on the country.
  • Continuation of Iran-US talks amid Israel's savagery 'unjustifiable': FM Araghchi Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the continuation of indirect talks between Iran and the United States amid Israel's savagery is "unjustifiable."
  • Leader names successor to late chief of IRGC Aerospace Division martyred in Israeli attack Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei has named the successor to the late commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Aerospace Division, who was assassinated in an Israeli military strike against the Iranian capital Tehran on Friday.
  • Iran's national security council convenes to discuss continued retaliation against Israel's aggression Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Supreme National Security Council (SNSC) has convened to plan continued retaliation against the Israeli regime's hostile acts.

  • Iranian envoy speaks at an emergency meeting of the United Nations Security Council IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The United Nations Security Council is holding an emergency meeting to discuss the Israeli strikes on Iran.
  • Envoy to U.N. says Iran's response to Israeli regime's attack will be lawful and decisive IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Ambassador and Permanent Representative to the United Nations Amir-Saeid Iravani says Iran's response to Israeli attacks will be lawful, proportionate, and decisive.
  • Iran's UN envoy: We will choose timing, manner of our lawful, proportionate response Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iran's ambassador and permanent representative to the UN says the Islamic Republic's response to the latest Israeli military strikes will be lawful and proportionate, emphasizing that Tehran will determine the timing, place, and means of its decisive retaliation.

  • China condemns Israel' violation of Iran's sovereignty, security and territorial integrity: Chinese envoy to UN Global Times 14 Jun 2025 -- China's Permanent Representative to the UN, Fu Cong, said at the UN Security Council's emergency meeting on the Middle East on Friday local time that China condemns Israel's violation of Iran's sovereignty, security, and territorial integrity, urging Israel to immediately cease all military adventurism, after Israel launched Friday a large-scale strike on Iranian military and nuclear sites, prompting retaliatory attacks from Tehran.
  • Chinese FM Wang Yi holds phone conversation with Iranian FM, says Israel's attack on nuclear facilities 'sets dangerous precedent' Global Times 14 Jun 2025 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi held a phone call with Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi on Saturday.
  • MBS in phone call with President: Israel seeks to drag the U.S. to the war with Iran IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman says Riyadh believes the Israeli regime seeks to deepen the conflict with Iran in an attempt to drag the United States into the war.
  • HRH the Crown Prince Condemns Israeli Attacks in Phone Call with Iranian President SPA 14 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, held a phone call on Saturday with President of the Islamic Republic of Iran Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian
  • HRH the Crown Prince Discusses Regional Escalation with Turkish President SPA 14 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan
  • HRH the Crown Prince, UK Prime Minister Discuss Latest Regional Developments in Phone Call SPA 14 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from Prime Minister of the United Kingdom Keir Starmer
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Italian Prime Minister Discuss Regional Developments SPA 14 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call from Prime Minister of the Italian Republic Giorgia Meloni
  • HRH the Crown Prince, French President Discuss Regional Developments SPA 14 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call from President of the French Republic Emmanuel Macron
  • Baku will not allow its airspace to be used for strikes on Iran: Azerbaijan's foreign minister IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Azerbaijani Foreign Minister Jeyhun Bayramov says that Azerbaijan will not allow its territory or airspace to be used for launching attacks against Iran or any other nation.
  • Iraqi foreign minister condemns sraeli airstrikes against Iran IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Iraqi Foreign Minister Fuad Hussein in a telephone conversation with his Iranian counterpart, Abbas Araqchi, on Friday has condemned the Israeli aggression against Iranian territories.
  • Germany, Egypt call for de-escalation after Israeli strikes on Iran People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul said during his visit to Egypt on Friday that the conditions in the region are worsening after the Israeli attacks on Iran.
  • Israeli strikes on Iran draw Mideast condemnation over sovereignty violation, escalation risks People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- Israel's large-scale strike on Iranian military and nuclear sites on Friday has drawn widespread condemnation across the Middle East, with governments denouncing the assault as a violation of international law and Iran's sovereignty.
  • Chinese envoy to IAEA condemns Israel's attack on Iranian nuclear facilities People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- China condemns Israel's military action against Iran and opposes armed attacks on peaceful nuclear facilities, a Chinese envoy said Friday at a meeting of the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA).
  • Israel/Iran: Statement by the High Representative on behalf of the European Union EC/CEU 14 Jun 2025 -- The European Union is following very closely the situation in the Middle East and expresses its deepest concern at the dangerous escalation that threatens to destabilise the Middle East following Israeli strikes on Iran and Iran's response.
  • Prime Minister's introduction at press conference on Israel's attack on Iran Government of Norway 14 Jun 2025 -- 'Last night's actions were more comprehensive and serious than those we have previously seen in the conflict between Iran and Israel. Norway joins other countries in calling on the parties to exercise restraint in order to avoid a major war in the region and help to reduce tensions,' said Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Støre.
  • China, Russia, condemn Israel's violation of Iran's sovereignty Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- China and Russia have strongly condemned Israel's aggression against Iran, calling it a violation of the Islamic Republic's sovereignty and territorial integrity.
  • Shanghai Cooperation Organization censures Israeli aggression on Iran Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- The Shanghai Cooperation Organization (SCO) has condemned in the strongest terms the latest Israeli act of aggression against multiple locations across Iran, which has resulted in the death of top brass military commanders, nuclear scientists, as well as ordinay citizens.
  • Azerbaijan's territory will not be used for strikes against Iran: FM Bayramov Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Azerbaijan says it will never allow its territory to be used against a third country, including neighboring and friendly Iran.
  • Pakistan expresses support for Iran, urges Muslim unity against Israel Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Pakistan has pledged full support for Iran at international forums and called on the Muslim world to unite against Israel amid its aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • 'Attackers will pay': Hamas hails clear message in Iran's missile strike Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- A Hamas leader says that Iran's missile retaliation against the Israeli regime sends a clear message; anyone who attacks will pay the price.
  • China slams Israel for crossing 'another red line' by attacking Iran Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- China's UN ambassador Fu Cong has condemned the Israeli regime's violation of Iran's sovereignty, security, and territorial integrity, urging Tel Aviv to put an immediate halt to its illegal aggression against Iran.
  • China urges Israel, Iran to resolve differences through dialogue and seek a path to peaceful coexistence: Wang Yi tells Israeli FM Saar in phone call Global Times 14 Jun 2025 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, also a member of the Political Bureau of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, held a phone call with Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Saar on Saturday, Xinhua reported.
  • President Erdoğan chairs security meeting Presidency of The Republic of Turkey 14 Jun 2025 -- President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan chaired a security meeting at the Presidential Complex.
  • Philippine Statement on the Situation in the Middle East Philippines DFA 14 Jun 2025 -- The Philippines is gravely concerned over heightened tensions in the Middle East region following Israel's airstrikes on Iran.

  • Trump presses Iran to make deal after Israeli strikes People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- In the wake of Israeli strikes on Iran overnight, U.S. President Donald Trump on Friday morning urged Tehran to strike a nuclear deal to avoid further Israeli attacks.
  • Iran-U.S. talks unjustifiable under present conditions: Foreign minister IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said on Saturday that the continuation of indirect Iran-U.S. talks amid Israel's savagery is "unjustifiable."
  • Tehran Says Continuing Dialogue With US Pointless While Israel Keeps Attacking Iran Sputnik 14 Jun 2025 -- Tehran sees no point in continuing its dialogue with Washington while Israel continues its attacks on Iran, Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei said on Saturday.
  • Iran has not yet decided on attending the next round of indirect talks with the U.S.: Spokesperson IRNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei says Tehran's decision to attend the next round of negotiations with the U.S. remains unclear.
  • Continuation of Iran-US talks amid Israel's savagery 'unjustifiable': FM Araghchi Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the continuation of indirect talks between Iran and the United States amid Israel's savagery is "unjustifiable."
  • Nuclear Talks Called Off As Iran Warns of Stronger Response If Israeli Attacks Persist RFE/RL 14 Jun 2025 -- Nuclear negotiations between Iran and the United States scheduled for June 15 in Muscat have been canceled, Oman's foreign minister announced.
  • Oman confirms cancellation of sixth round of Iran-US talks following Israeli aggression Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- Putting speculation to rest, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Albusaidi has announced that the sixth round of indirect nuclear talks between Iran and the United States will not take place.
  • Iran says US actions have rendered ongoing diplomatic dialogue 'meaningless' Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- The Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman says Tehran has not yet decided on its participation in the sixth round of indirect nuclear talks with the United States, noting that the other side's actions have effectively rendered negotiation and dialogue "meaningless."

  • Israeli attacks on Iran raises risk of regional conflict People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- Israel on Friday launched a large-scale "preemptive, precise, combined" strike on Iranian military and nuclear sites, prompting retaliatory attacks from Tehran.
  • Tensions Are Surging Amid Israel-Iran Attacks. So Are Oil Prices RFE/RL 14 Jun 2025 -- Global oil prices spiked following Israel's surprise air strikes on Iranian nuclear and military facilities.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Foreign Minister, US Special Envoy for Syria Discuss Steps to Support Syria SPA 14 Jun 2025 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah received a phone call today from United States Special Envoy for Syria Thomas Barrack

  • Cambodia to file complaint with UN court over border disputes with Thailand: PM People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- Cambodia will file a complaint on Sunday with the International Court of Justice (ICJ), the principal judicial organ of the United Nations, over four disputed border areas with Thailand, Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet said Friday night.

News Reports

  • Israeli regime's spy chief steps down as Iranian missiles pound occupied territories Press TV 14 Jun 2025 -- The head of the Israeli regime's Shin Bet spy agency has stepped down amid Iran's large-scale retaliatory military operation against the Zionist entity late on Saturday.

  • Commentary by Aide to the President of Russia Yury Ushakov following the telephone conversation between Vladimir Putin and President of the United States Donald Trump President of Russia 14 Jun 2025
  • Trump Speaks With Putin On Middle East, Urges End To 'His War' In Ukraine RFE/RL 15 Jun 2025 -- US President Donald Trump and Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin spoke for nearly an hour by phone on June 14, with discussions centering on the latest armed conflict between Iran and Israel.
  • Putin Holds Phone Conversation With Trump Sputnik 14 Jun 2025 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin has conversed with US President Donald Trump by phone today.
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran Abbas Araghchi Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 14 Jun 2025
  • Statement of the Shanghai Cooperation Organization Regarding Military Strikes on the Territory of the Islamic Republic of Iran Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 14 Jun 2025
  • Ex-Russian Diplomat Pleads Guilty To Lying To FBI; Prosecutors Drop More Serious Charges RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- A former Russian diplomat who was charged with conspiring to evade sanctions by working for Russian oligarch Oleg Deripaska pleaded guilty to a lesser count of lying to FBI agents.

  • China and the EU Hold Human Rights Dialogue PRC MofA 14 Jun 2025 -- On June 13, 2025, Director-General of the Department of International Organizations and Conferences of the Foreign Ministry Shen Bo and Deputy Managing Director for Asia and the Pacific at the European External Action Service Paola Pampaloni co-chaired the China-EU Human Rights Dialogue in Brussels.
  • China: 40th Human Rights Dialogue with the European Union takes place in Brussels European External Action Service (EEAS) 14 Jun 2025 -- The European Union and the People's Republic of China held the 40th session of the EU-China Human Rights Dialogue in Brussels on 13 June. The Dialogue was preceded by a field visit to South Tyrol (Italy) on 11 June.

  • Taiwanese risk citizenship loss over China 'border tourism passports': MAC CNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Taiwanese who have obtained or currently hold "border tourism passports" issued by the Chinese authorities for short-term travel in China's border regions will lose their "Taiwan status," according to the Mainland Affairs Council (MAC).
  • Taiwan's ex-President Ma Ying-jeou heads to China for forum CNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Former President Ma Ying-jeou (馬英九) on Saturday said his latest trip to China, including his first-time attendance at the Straits Forum, can promote "closer people-to-people exchanges" across the Taiwan Strait, as he embarked on his fourth visit to the mainland since leaving office.
  • Ex-chairman of Kuomintang Ma Ying-jeou embarks on 4th visit to Chinese mainland Global Times 14 Jun 2025 -- Former chairman of the Chinese Kuomintang party Ma Ying-jeou embarked on his fourth visit to the Chinese mainland since leaving office, leading a group of young visitors from the island of Taiwan to Fujian and Gansu provinces from June 14 to 27, Cankaoxiaoxi, a newspaper under the Xinhua News Agency, reported on Saturday, citing Taiwan media.
  • China warns certain countries against emboldening separatists in Taiwan People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- A Chinese defense spokesperson on Friday urged relevant countries to abide by the one-China principle and stop sending any wrong signal to the "Taiwan independence" separatists.
  • Mainland slams DPP for manipulation of judiciary to suppress mainland ship captain People's Daily 14 Jun 2025 -- A Chinese mainland spokesperson on Friday voiced strong opposition against manipulation by Taiwan's Democratic Progressive Party (DPP) authorities of the judiciary to suppress a ship captain from the mainland.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 14 Jun 2025

  • Valuable Appreciation Given by Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un KCNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un visited the Chollima Tile Factory one day in August 2014.
  • Framework Projects of Leisure Complex in Kaephung District Completed KCNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The officers and men of the 124th Regiment of the Korean People's Army, who were dispatched to Kaephung District, Kaesong Municipality of the DPRK, successfully completed the framework project of a leisure complex following the framework project of regional-industry factories.
  • DPRK Railway Transport Sector Makes Success in Improving Railway Conditions KCNA 14 Jun 2025 -- The officials and workers in the railway transport sector of the DPRK are achieving successes in improving the railway conditions.
  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Gives Field Guidance at Major Munitions Industry Enterprise KCNA 14 Jun 2025 -- Kim Jong Un , general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, gave field guidance at a major munitions industry enterprise on June 13.

  • Japan-U.S. Consultation on U.S. Tariff Measures Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 14 Jun 2025

  • Press conference - Seattle Prime Minister of Australia 14 Jun 2025
